title: vandellia hirta
intro: Vandellia hirta, also known as 'kuth,' is a plant species native to the tropical regions of India, Sri Lanka, and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of a compound called kuth oil. The health benefits of Vandellia hirta include its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Vandellia hirta is often combined with other plants to create topical creams and oils that can be applied directly to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
